# dead-code-hunter Architecture Docs

## Entitys
- [ActionLifecycle — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/subdomain-actionlifecycle.html): Manages the setup and breakdown of the Node.js execution within the runner. Architecture documentation for the ActionLifecycle subdomain (part of GitHubAction domain) in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [DeadCodeAnalysis Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/domain-deadcodeanalysis.html): Handles the core logic for filtering and interpreting code analysis results from the Supermodel SDK. Architectural overview of the DeadCodeAnalysis domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [GitHubAction Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/domain-githubaction.html): The primary entry point and lifecycle orchestrator for the GitHub Action runtime environment. Architectural overview of the GitHubAction domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 5 source files.
- [InputParsing — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/subdomain-inputparsing.html): Handles reading environment variables and action inputs like ignore patterns. Architecture documentation for the InputParsing subdomain (part of GitHubAction domain) in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [ReportFormatting Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/domain-reportformatting.html): Generates human-readable Markdown documentation for integration into GitHub pull requests. Architectural overview of the ReportFormatting domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [SDKIntegration Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/domain-sdkintegration.html): The communication layer with external Supermodel services for graph-based code analysis. Architectural overview of the SDKIntegration domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [createZipArchive() — dead-code-hunter Function Reference](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/fn-index-ts-createziparchive.html): Architecture documentation for the createZipArchive() function in index.ts from the dead-code-hunter codebase.
- [dead-code.test.ts — dead-code-hunter Source File](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/file-src-tests-dead-code-test-ts.html): Architecture documentation for dead-code.test.ts, a typescript file in the dead-code-hunter codebase.
